phases.name: Core Fundamentals
phases.description: Mastering the absolute fundamentals necessary for "machine learning".

lessons.name: Introduction Chapter
lessons.content:
### Welcome to machine learning!

In this introductory lesson, we will cover the core landscape. Whether you are a total beginner or just brushing up, visual clarity is key.

#### Key Mechanics:
1. **Inputs & Definitions**: Define clean pipelines so that you can organize your thoughts.
2. **First Script Operations**: Execute core computations using the target system parameters.
3. **Execution flow**: Process inputs chronologically.

We will verify this with a simple multiple-choice quiz up next!

quizQuestions.question: What is the most crucial asset when first approaching machine learning?
options: Memorizing external libraries from front to back
Buying the most expensive cloud computing hardware
Waiting for others to complete it on video stream
quizQuestions.explanation: Step-by-step sequential practice prevents cognitive overload and embeds skills deeper into long-term retention blocks.

phases.name: Applied Integration
phases.description: Applying concepts with practical hands-on mini-projects.

lessons.name: Setting Up the Logic Loop
lessons.content:
### Practical Engineering

In this module we focus on creating robust error safety bounds.

- **Check Constraints**: Validate that data structures are non-empty.
- **Fail Fast**: Log errors, propagate fallback status, and raise clean warnings.

phases.name: Mastery & Scale
phases.description: Optimizing architectures and learning professional industry techniques.

lessons.name: Auditing Throughput Scenarios
lessons.content:
### Scaling the System
Understand the trade-offs between speed, latency, and costs under heavy loads.

curated_resources.title: Deep Learning Foundations & Abstractions
curated_resources.description: Excellent video explaining deep neural networks and backpropagation visually.

curated_resources.title: Google Machine Learning Crash Course
curated_resources.description: Google's high-speed structured introduction to core ML concepts.

curated_resources.title: Advanced Scientific Computing with NumPy
curated_resources.description: Comprehensive tutorials on tensor layouts, multi-dimensional slicing, and broadcast loops.

curated_resources.title: A Whirlwind Tour of Python Coding
curated_resources.description: Fast track course on essential syntax, structures, and object orientation.

curated_resources.title: Linear Algebra Cheat Sheet & Vectors
curated_resources.description: A beautifully formatted guide covering matrices, dot products, and principal dimensions.

curated_resources.title: The Matrix Calculus & Backpropagation Handbook
curated_resources.description: Rigorous derivation of cost function optimizations and weight updates.

curated_resources.title: Attention Is All You Need (Transformer Paper)
curated_resources.description: The breakthrough research paper detailing the self-attention architecture.

curated_resources.title: Prompt Engineering Techniques & Standards
curated_resources.description: Industry-standard guides on dynamic template styling, few-shot routing, and chain of thought.

projects.title: Custom AI Prompt Template Builder & Proxy
projects.description: Build an editor to style and optimize customizable system prompts, validating them using strict safety filters.

projects.title: Interactive NumPy Tensor Calculator
projects.description: A visual calculator demonstrating dot products, matrix multiplications, transpose operations, and scalar broadcasting rules.

projects.title: Document PDF Ingestion Engine & Summarizer
projects.description: A robust web utility that parses text from uploaded PDF chapters, generates chunk-based summaries, and builds high-speed search filters.

projects.title: Local Git Commit Enhancer & Interactive Explainer
projects.description: Integrate dynamic git hooks to read git diff files, draft informative commit messages matching core conventions, and explain semantic changes.

projects.title: Autonomous AI Debugging Sandbox & Runner
projects.description: Create a secured, encapsulated browser coding playground that runs exercises, analyzes error logs, and requests corrective instructions from Gemini.
